title: December 2
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 2''' is the 336th day of the year (337th in leap years). There are 29 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1931|1931]] – [[Gareth Wigan]] is born.
*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Keith Szarabajka]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] trailer released in the [[Wikipedia:United Kingdom|United Kingdom]].
*[[2003]] – [[Star Wars Insider 72|''Star Wars Insider'' 72]] published.
*2004 – [[Wikipedia:Nintendo DS|Nintendo DS]] is launched.
*[[2005]] – "[[Kella Rand, Reporting...]]" is republished on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2009]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Slaves of the Republic (TPB)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Slaves of the Republic'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Deadly Hands of Shon-Ju]]'' published.
*2010 – ''[[The Old Republic 6: Blood of the Empire, Part 3]]'' published.
*2010 – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Quinlan Vos: Jedi in Darkness]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – "[[Slaves of the Republic]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars: I Want to Be a Jedi]]'' published {{C|eBook}}
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 13|''Star Wars'' (2015) 13]] published.
*2015 – ''[[Jakku Spy]]'' released.
*2015 – "[[The Future of the Force]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*2015 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 12|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 12]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Knights of the Eternal Throne]]'' released.
*[[2018]] – "[[Secrets and Holograms]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*2018 – [[Salo Gardner]] dies.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars: Skeleton Crew]]'' premiered on Disney+ with [[This Could Be a Real Adventure]] & [[Way, Way Out Past the Barrier]].
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars: Doctor Aphra – Friends & Enemies Omnibus]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Doug Chiang: The Cinematic Legacy]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Reign of the Empire: The Mask of Fear]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2025 – [[Alphabet Squadron (novel)|''Alphabet Squadron'']] reprinted in paperback.
*2025 – ''[[Shadow Fall: An Alphabet Squadron Novel]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2025 – ''[[Victory's Price: An Alphabet Squadron Novel]]'' reprinted in paperback.
